title: Unvoted & Shelved
description: Gives life to the mobs that lost the votes.
body:
![Unvoted & Shelved](https://i.imgur.com/F5Svwzh.png)


# Unsatisfied with the results of the votes? Or maybe you just want to see something new?

 ## This mod aims to add losing features from votes during Minecraft Live in a way that is comparable to the official content in the game while also coming up with unique ideas to make them useful.

### As of now, this mod adds two mobs that lost the votes; The Glare, and the Copper Golem.

+ ###  The Glare is a utility mob that can help you light up dark areas, by giving it a Glow Berry. These luscious friends spawn in their equally as lush biomes.

+ ###  The Copper Golem is a utility mob that can help you with Redstone contraptions, spawn in new ruined structures, and serve as unique decoration.
